# Auto-generated by modulestrap pattern (mirrors w10m/meow420's CMakeLists.txt)
# — safe to customize. Only compile Cardstack sources + pull in LVGL when it's
# the selected UI backend, so other devices' binaries stay lean.
if(CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_CARDSTACK)
    set(CARDSTACK_SRCS
        cardstack_module.c
        cardstack_hal.c
        cardstack_ui.c
        cardstack_win.c
    )
    set(CARDSTACK_REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl app_manager)
else()
    set(CARDSTACK_SRCS "")
    set(CARDSTACK_REQUIRES "")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${CARDSTACK_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        .
        ../../kernel/core
        ../../kernel/catcalls
    REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl app_manager
)
